title: Dr. Beckmann Upholstery Stain Remover | Removes stubborn stains from sofas, car seats etc | 400ml
features: Powerful stain removal 1st time - works in just 3 mins
Specially developed to eliminate stubborn and dried-in stains from coffee to tomato sauce
Ideal for a variety of different indoor and outdoor upholstered surfaces such as sofas, car seats, mattresses etc.
Integrated 2in1 triangle soft brush reaches every corner and hard-to-reach stains with ease
description: Product Description The Dr. Beckmann Upholstery Stain Remover is a true game-changer in household cleaning! In just 3 minutes, it effortlessly tackles the toughest of stains - wine, juice, coffee, tea, sauces - even those dried-in stains. But it doesn't stop here. This powerful formula with Oxi and Anti-Odour Freshplex® technology not only removes stains but also eliminates unpleasant smells and lingering odours, leaving your home smelling fresh and clean. Complete with integrated 2-in-1 triangle soft brush to reach every corner and hard-to-reach stains with ease. Use it confidently on sofas, car seats, mattresses and strollers. Despite being tough on stains, the product is still gentle on colours and fibres to ensure fabrics stay in tact after cleaning. For your peace of mind our formula has been dermatologically tested and is safe to use around pets. Say goodbye to stains and odours, and say hello to a cleaner, happier home! HOW TO USE IT: 1. Open the bottle, pierce a 2mm hole in seal. Screw on brush. Remove loose surface dirt. 2. Apply and work lightly into the fabric. Do not soak. 3. Leave to work for 3 minutes. 4. Completely dab off any residues with a damp light-coloured cloth. Rinse brush after use. IMPORTANT INFORMATION: - Before use: test for colour fastness & material compatibility on an inconspicuous area. - Always follow the manufacturers cleaning instructions. - Not suitable for silk, velvet and fabrics sensitive to water. - Store bottle in an upright position. - Keep cleaner and its packaging away from pets. - It is advisable that your pet is not in the same room when you clean the upholstery. - Bird owner: air the room well during and after use. ECO CONTRIBUTION: - Biodegradable - Formula 0 % chlorine bleach, dyes - Made with 100 % renewable electricity - 100 % recycled & recyclable bottle* (*bottle body) Ingredients / Directions 1.
